definitions.zh: 协同角色是以协调角色为关键概念的本体边界；CoordinationRole 及编排者、子智能体、工作者、审查者等角色专门类型。 其成员归属遵循：当对象表达一项可由不同运行主体承担的协作职责，或某主体在给定任务和时段承担该职责的绑定时，在此拥有。
definitions.en: Coordination roles is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion coordination role; CoordinationRole and orchestrator, subagent, worker, reviewer, and related role specializations. Membership follows: Own an object when it expresses a collaboration responsibility that different runtime actors may bear, or a binding assigning that responsibility for a task and interval.
definitions.ja: 協調ロールは調整役割を主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。CoordinationRole と orchestrator、subagent、worker、reviewer などの役割特殊型。 所属判定は次に従います：対象が複数の実行主体が担い得る協働責務、または特定タスク・期間で主体へ責務を割り当てるバインディングを表す場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 定义协作中需要承担的协调角色与角色绑定，使运行主体可在不同任务和团队中改变职责而不改变主体身份。
purpose.en: Define coordination roles and role bindings so runtime actors can change responsibilities across tasks and teams without changing actor identity.
purpose.ja: 協働で担う調整役割と役割バインディングを定義し、実行主体が同一性を変えずタスクやチームごとに責務を変えられるようにします。

includes.zh: CoordinationRole 及编排者、子智能体、工作者、审查者等角色专门类型。
includes.en: CoordinationRole and orchestrator, subagent, worker, reviewer, and related role specializations.
includes.ja: CoordinationRole と orchestrator、subagent、worker、reviewer などの役割特殊型。

includes.zh: ActorRoleBinding、团队角色、协调归属、适用任务与有效时间范围。
includes.en: ActorRoleBinding, team roles, coordination membership, applicable tasks, and validity intervals.

excludes.zh: AgentAsToolInvocation 归调用与执行；协调角色只描述调用者在协作中的职责，不拥有一次程序化工具调用的发生身份。
excludes.en: AgentAsToolInvocation belongs to invocation and execution; coordination roles describe the caller's collaboration responsibility but do not own the occurrence identity of a programmatic tool call.
excludes.ja: AgentAsToolInvocation は呼び出しと実行に属し、協調ロールは呼び出し元の協働責務を記述しますが、プログラム的ツール呼び出しの発生同一性を所有しません。

excludes.zh: HumanActor、AgentActor、SystemServiceActor、ToolServiceActor 和 Model 等运行参与者归运行参与者与绑定；Role 不等于 Actor。
excludes.en: HumanActor, AgentActor, SystemServiceActor, ToolServiceActor, Model, and other runtime participants belong to runtime actors and bindings; Role is not Actor.
excludes.ja: HumanActor、AgentActor、SystemServiceActor、ToolServiceActor、Model 等は runtime actor/binding に属し、Role は Actor ではありません。

excludes.zh: DelegationProcess、Handoff、WorkerSelection 和委派契约归委派与移交；角色不会自动产生委派事件。
excludes.en: DelegationProcess, Handoff, WorkerSelection, and delegation contracts belong to delegation and handoff; a role does not automatically create a delegation event.
excludes.ja: DelegationProcess、Handoff、WorkerSelection、委任契約は委任と引き継ぎに属し、役割が自動的に委任イベントを生成することはありません。

description.zh: 协同角色的输入概念族为子智能体角色；责任交接由已接受事实 编排者角色 —delegates_to_subagent→ 子智能体角色 (delegates_to_subagent) 明确给出。
description.en: The input families for Coordination roles are subagent role; the accepted facts orchestrator role —delegates_to_subagent→ subagent role (delegates_to_subagent) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 協調ロールの入力概念族はサブエージェント役割です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 オーケストレーター役割 —delegates_to_subagent→ サブエージェント役割 (delegates_to_subagent) により明示されます。

description.zh: 协同角色的输出概念族为智能体工具调用；责任交接由已接受事实 编排者角色 —uses_agent_as_tool→ 智能体工具调用 (uses_agent_as_tool) 明确给出。
description.en: The output families for Coordination roles are Agent-as-tool invocation; the accepted facts orchestrator role —uses_agent_as_tool→ Agent-as-tool invocation (uses_agent_as_tool) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 協調ロールの出力概念族はエージェントツール呼び出しです。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 オーケストレーター役割 —uses_agent_as_tool→ エージェントツール呼び出し (uses_agent_as_tool) により明示されます。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体不负责判定运行失败。委派、组合或运行追踪需要说明谁以何种协作职责参与时，引用 CoordinationRole 与 ActorRoleBinding，同时保留 Actor 的运行身份。
not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology does not own runtime-failure adjudication. Delegation, composition, or runtime tracing references CoordinationRole and ActorRoleBinding when stating which responsibility an actor bears while retaining the actor's runtime identity.
not_applicable_reason.ja: このオントロジーは実行失敗の判定を所有しません。delegation、composition、runtime tracing が actor の collaboration responsibility を示すとき、Actor identity を保って CoordinationRole と ActorRoleBinding を参照します。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体不负责启动恢复流程。委派、组合或运行追踪需要说明谁以何种协作职责参与时，引用 CoordinationRole 与 ActorRoleBinding，同时保留 Actor 的运行身份。
not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology does not initiate a recovery workflow. Delegation, composition, or runtime tracing references CoordinationRole and ActorRoleBinding when stating which responsibility an actor bears while retaining the actor's runtime identity.
not_applicable_reason.ja: このオントロジーは回復ワークフローを開始しません。delegation、composition、runtime tracing が actor の collaboration responsibility を示すとき、Actor identity を保って CoordinationRole と ActorRoleBinding を参照します。

decision_note.zh: 协同角色与委派与移交按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Coordination roles and Delegation and handoff are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 協調ロールと委任と引き継ぎは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 协同角色与委派与移交按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。

labels.zh: 在指定任务与时间点，哪些运行主体承担编排者、工作者或审查者角色？：正例
labels.en: At a specified task and time, which runtime actors bear orchestrator, worker, or reviewer roles?: positive case
labels.ja: 指定 task と時点で、どの runtime actor が orchestrator、worker、reviewer role を担いますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 协调归属记录、参与者角色绑定、编排者角色、主体绑定记录 作边界比较；问题“在指定任务与时间点，哪些运行主体承担编排者、工作者或审查者角色？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares coordination ownership record, actor role binding, orchestrator role, actor binding at the ownership boundary. The question “At a specified task and time, which runtime actors bear orchestrator, worker, or reviewer roles?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は 調整帰属記録、アクター役割バインディング、オーケストレーター役割、アクター束縛記録 を所有境界で比較します。質問「指定 task と時点で、どの runtime actor が orchestrator、worker、reviewer role を担いますか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Every answer is an active binding between a runtime actor and a role; the actor is not inferred from a role class name.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Every answer is an active binding between a runtime actor and a role; the actor is not inferred from a role class name.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Every answer is an active binding between a runtime actor and a role; the actor is not inferred from a role class name.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

labels.zh: 一个协作拓扑要求的角色是否都已绑定，是否有冲突绑定或无人承担的职责？：正例
labels.en: Are all roles required by a collaboration topology bound, and are there conflicting bindings or unfilled responsibilities?: positive case
labels.ja: collaboration topology が要求する role は全て binding 済みで、conflicting binding や unfilled responsibility はありませんか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 协调归属记录、组合部件、答案归属、分段分配 作边界比较；问题“一个协作拓扑要求的角色是否都已绑定，是否有冲突绑定或无人承担的职责？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares coordination ownership record, composition part, answer ownership, section assignment at the ownership boundary. The question “Are all roles required by a collaboration topology bound, and are there conflicting bindings or unfilled responsibilities?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.

owns_when.zh: 当对象表达一项可由不同运行主体承担的协作职责，或某主体在给定任务和时段承担该职责的绑定时，在此拥有。
owns_when.en: Own an object when it expresses a collaboration responsibility that different runtime actors may bear, or a binding assigning that responsibility for a task and interval.
owns_when.ja: 対象が複数の実行主体が担い得る協働責務、または特定タスク・期間で主体へ責務を割り当てるバインディングを表す場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 委派、组合或运行追踪需要说明谁以何种协作职责参与时，引用 CoordinationRole 与 ActorRoleBinding，同时保留 Actor 的运行身份。
references_when.en: Delegation, composition, or runtime tracing references CoordinationRole and ActorRoleBinding when stating which responsibility an actor bears while retaining the actor's runtime identity.
references_when.ja: delegation、composition、runtime tracing が actor の collaboration responsibility を示すとき、Actor identity を保って CoordinationRole と ActorRoleBinding を参照します。

rationale.zh: 协同角色拥有职责类型与主体绑定；委派与移交拥有把工作、控制或责任从一方转给另一方的过程和约定。 本条仅记录 CoordinationOwnershipRecord、SubagentRole、WorkerRole；其 canonical owner 是协同角色（orchestration-actors-delegation），因此 orchestration-actors-delegation 在此拥有这些概念。
rationale.en: Coordination roles own responsibility types and actor bindings; delegation and handoff own processes and agreements that transfer work, control, or responsibility. This record is limited to CoordinationOwnershipRecord, SubagentRole, WorkerRole; their canonical owner is Coordination roles (orchestration-actors-delegation), so orchestration-actors-delegation owns these concepts here.
rationale.ja: 協調ロールは責務型と主体バインディングを所有し、委任と引き継ぎは作業、制御、責任を一方から他方へ移す過程と合意を所有します。 この記録は CoordinationOwnershipRecord、SubagentRole、WorkerRole だけを対象とし、canonical owner は協調ロール（orchestration-actors-delegation）です。したがって orchestration-actors-delegation はここでこれらを所有します。

The source does not define Moonweave Modules orchestration-actors-delegation or orchestration-delegation-handoff, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. short_definitions.zh: 答案归属是以如下事实为区分特征的协调归属记录：它记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。
short_definitions.en: Answer ownership is a coordination ownership record; its differentiating condition is that it records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.
short_definitions.ja: 回答帰属は調整帰属記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。

definitions.zh: 答案归属是以如下事实为区分特征的协调归属记录：它记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。
definitions.en: Answer ownership is a coordination ownership record; its differentiating condition is that it records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.
definitions.ja: 回答帰属は調整帰属記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。

why_needed.zh: 答案归属为canonical 事实 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）提供明确端点并保持与 ControlOwnership 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: answer ownership provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact retains_answer_ownership (AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ControlOwnership.
why_needed.ja: 回答帰属はcanonical 事実 retains_answer_ownership（AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership）の明確な端点を提供し、ControlOwnership との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的答案归属：答案归属是以如下事实为区分特征的协调归属记录：它记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。；该种差可由关系 retains_answer_ownership 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes answer ownership records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Answer ownership is a coordination ownership record; its differentiating condition is that it records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in retains_answer_ownership.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす回答帰属を含みます：回答帰属は調整帰属記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。 種差は関係 retains_answer_ownership の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 控制归属虽与本概念同属 CoordinationOwnershipRecord，但其定义为“控制归属是一种协调归属记录；其区分条件是：它记录当前由哪个参与者控制下一步工作流，包括管理者保留控制或通过交接转移控制。”，不得替代答案归属。
excludes.en: ControlOwnership shares parent CoordinationOwnershipRecord, but its reviewed definition is “As a coordination ownership record, Control ownership is distinguished by the fact that it records which actor currently controls the next workflow step, including whether control is retained by a manager or transferred through handoff.”; it must not be substituted for AnswerOwnership.
excludes.ja: ControlOwnership は同じ上位 CoordinationOwnershipRecord を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「調整帰属記録に属する制御帰属は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、次のワークフロー手順を現在どの参加者が制御するかを記録し、管理者が保持する場合と引き継ぎで移転する場合を区別します。」であり、AnswerOwnership の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将答案归属（AnswerOwnership）记录为 AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“答案归属是以如下事实为区分特征的协调归属记录：它记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责”。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records answer ownership (AnswerOwnership) as the target of AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership. Its reviewed definition is “Answer ownership is a coordination ownership record; its differentiating condition is that it records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis”.
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムは回答帰属（AnswerOwnership）を AgentAsToolInvocation retains_answer_ownership AnswerOwnership の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「回答帰属は調整帰属記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 AnswerOwnership 以及方向保持不变的事实 retains_answer_ownership。
expected_result.en: The run can query AnswerOwnership together with direction-preserving fact retains_answer_ownership.
expected_result.ja: この実行では AnswerOwnership と方向を保持した事実 retains_answer_ownership を共に照会できます。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 AnswerOwnership（答案归属）由 orchestration-actors-delegation 拥有，用于“当对象表达一项可由不同运行主体承担的协作职责，或某主体在给定任务和时段承担该职责的绑定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms AnswerOwnership (answer ownership) is owned by orchestration-actors-delegation for the use case “Own an object when it expresses a collaboration responsibility that different runtime actors may bear, or a binding assigning that responsibility for a task and interval.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は AnswerOwnership（回答帰属）を orchestration-actors-delegation が「対象が複数の実行主体が担い得る協働責務、または特定タスク・期間で主体へ責務を割り当てるバインディングを表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 AnswerOwnership 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms AnswerOwnership has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は AnswerOwnership の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: AnswerOwnership 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for AnswerOwnership were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: AnswerOwnership の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 答案归属已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。

change_note.ja: 回答帰属は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 已审查兄弟区分：父节点 CoordinationOwnershipRecord：AnswerOwnership（semantic kind=information，骨架 AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord）；ControlOwnership（semantic kind=information，骨架 ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord）。双端条件：AnswerOwnership 条件：“答案归属是以如下事实为区分特征的协调归属记录：它记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责”；ControlOwnership 条件：“控制归属是一种协调归属记录；其区分条件是：它记录当前由哪个参与者控制下一步工作流，包括管理者保留控制或通过交接转移控制”。任一条件成立不推出另一端。
differentia.en: Reviewed sibling distinction: parent CoordinationOwnershipRecord: AnswerOwnership (semantic kind=information, backbone AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord); ControlOwnership (semantic kind=information, backbone ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord). Endpoint conditions: AnswerOwnership condition: “Answer ownership is a coordination ownership record; its differentiating condition is that it records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis”; ControlOwnership condition: “As a coordination ownership record, Control ownership is distinguished by the fact that it records which actor currently controls the next workflow step, including whether control is retained by a manager or transferred through handoff”. Either condition leaves the other unproven.
differentia.ja: 審査済み兄弟区別：親 CoordinationOwnershipRecord：AnswerOwnership（semantic kind=information、バックボーン AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord）；ControlOwnership（semantic kind=information、バックボーン ControlOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord）。両端条件：AnswerOwnership の条件：「回答帰属は調整帰属記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します」；ControlOwnership の条件：「調整帰属記録に属する制御帰属は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、次のワークフロー手順を現在どの参加者が制御するかを記録し、管理者が保持する場合と引き継ぎで移転する場合を区別します」。一方の成立は他方を証明しません。

descriptions.zh: AnswerOwnership 用作CoordinationOwnershipRecord的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 AnswerOwnership 的已审查定义是“答案归属是以如下事实为区分特征的协调归属记录：它记录在委派、交接、审查或综合之后，哪个协同参与者对最终答复或产物负责。”。不能因 relation AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord 而把它归入CoordinationOwnershipRecord。
descriptions.en: AnswerOwnership is the boundary contrast for CoordinationOwnershipRecord. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AnswerOwnership's reviewed definition is “Answer ownership is a coordination ownership record; its differentiating condition is that it records which coordinating actor is accountable for the final response or artifact after delegation, handoff, review, or synthesis.”. relation AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord does not make it a CoordinationOwnershipRecord.
descriptions.ja: AnswerOwnership は CoordinationOwnershipRecord の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、AnswerOwnership の審査済み定義は「回答帰属は調整帰属記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、委任、引き継ぎ、レビュー、統合の後で、どの協調参加者が最終回答または成果物に責任を持つかを記録します。」です。relation AnswerOwnership-is_a-CoordinationOwnershipRecord だけで CoordinationOwnershipRecord にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: AnswerOwnership 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 CoordinationOwnershipRecord。
expected_result.en: AnswerOwnership retains its own type; validation must not promote it to CoordinationOwnershipRecord from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: AnswerOwnership は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで CoordinationOwnershipRecord へ昇格してはなりません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 CoordinationOwnershipRecord（协调归属记录）由 orchestration-actors-delegation 拥有，用于“当对象表达一项可由不同运行主体承担的协作职责，或某主体在给定任务和时段承担该职责的绑定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms CoordinationOwnershipRecord (coordination ownership record) is owned by orchestration-actors-delegation for the use case “Own an object when it expresses a collaboration responsibility that different runtime actors may bear, or a binding assigning that responsibility for a task and interval.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は CoordinationOwnershipRecord（調整帰属記録）を orchestration-actors-delegation が「対象が複数の実行主体が担い得る協働責務、または特定タスク・期間で主体へ責務を割り当てるバインディングを表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 CoordinationOwnershipRecord 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 reviewed root composition-root，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=root_status=composition-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms CoordinationOwnershipRecord has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone reviewed root composition-root, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=root_status=composition-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は CoordinationOwnershipRecord の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が reviewed root composition-root であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=root_status=composition-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

short_definitions.zh: 协调角色是以如下事实为区分特征的角色：它是在编排关系中规定一个参与主体承担何种分解、委派、执行、监督、汇总或汇报责任，并可通过 ActorRoleBinding 赋予主体的角色上位概念。
short_definitions.en: Coordination role is a role; its differentiating condition is that it specifies decomposition, delegation, performance, supervision, synthesis, or reporting responsibilities in orchestration and is borne by an actor through an ActorRoleBinding.
short_definitions.ja: 調整役割は役割の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：CoordinationRole は編成関係で主体が担う分解、委任、実行、監督、統合、報告責任を規定し、ActorRoleBinding を通じて主体に付与される役割上位概念である。

definitions.zh: 协调角色是以如下事实为区分特征的角色：它是在编排关系中规定一个参与主体承担何种分解、委派、执行、监督、汇总或汇报责任，并可通过 ActorRoleBinding 赋予主体的角色上位概念。

excludes.zh: 编排者角色只是关系 Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole 的另一端；相关联不表示它是协调角色。

short_definitions.en: As a coordination role, Orchestrator role is distinguished by the fact that orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.
short_definitions.ja: 調整役割に属するオーケストレーター役割は、次の事実を種差とします：Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。

definitions.zh: 编排者角色是一种协调角色；其区分条件是：它描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。
definitions.en: As a coordination role, Orchestrator role is distinguished by the fact that orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.
definitions.ja: 調整役割に属するオーケストレーター役割は、次の事実を種差とします：Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。

why_needed.zh: 编排者角色为canonical 事实 delegates_to_subagent（Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole）提供明确端点并保持与 SubagentRole 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: orchestrator role provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact delegates_to_subagent (Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole) while preserving its reviewed boundary from SubagentRole.
why_needed.ja: オーケストレーター役割はcanonical 事実 delegates_to_subagent（Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole）の明確な端点を提供し、SubagentRole との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的编排者角色：编排者角色是一种协调角色；其区分条件是：它描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。；该种差可由关系 delegates_to_subagent 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes orchestrator role records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As a coordination role, Orchestrator role is distinguished by the fact that orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in delegates_to_subagent.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすオーケストレーター役割を含みます：調整役割に属するオーケストレーター役割は、次の事実を種差とします：Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。 種差は関係 delegates_to_subagent の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 子智能体角色虽与本概念同属 CoordinationRole，但其定义为“子智能体角色是以如下事实为区分特征的协调角色：它是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色。”，不得替代编排者角色。
excludes.en: SubagentRole shares parent CoordinationRole, but its reviewed definition is “Subagent role is a coordination role; its differentiating condition is that it is a CoordinationRole distinguished by bounded work, authority, context, and upward reporting.”; it must not be substituted for Orchestrator.
excludes.ja: SubagentRole は同じ上位 CoordinationRole を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「サブエージェント役割は調整役割の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：SubagentRole は限定された作業、権限、文脈、上位への報告で区別される CoordinationRole である。」であり、Orchestrator の代用にはできません。

labels.ja: オーケストレーター役割の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将编排者角色（Orchestrator）记录为 Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole 的源端点。其已审查定义是“编排者角色是一种协调角色；其区分条件是：它描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类”。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records orchestrator role (Orchestrator) as the source of Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole. Its reviewed definition is “As a coordination role, Orchestrator role is distinguished by the fact that orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype”.
descriptions.ja: コーディネーターによるタスク分解と委任の実行では、システムはオーケストレーター役割（Orchestrator）を Orchestrator delegates_to_subagent SubagentRole の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「調整役割に属するオーケストレーター役割は、次の事実を種差とします：Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 Orchestrator 以及方向保持不变的事实 delegates_to_subagent。
expected_result.en: The run can query Orchestrator together with direction-preserving fact delegates_to_subagent.
expected_result.ja: この実行では Orchestrator と方向を保持した事実 delegates_to_subagent を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、delegates_to_subagent 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of delegates_to_subagent, the concept definition, and available field values.

descriptions.zh: SubagentRole 用作Orchestrator的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 SubagentRole 的已审查定义是“子智能体角色是以如下事实为区分特征的协调角色：它是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色。”。不能因 shared parent CoordinationRole 而把它归入Orchestrator。
descriptions.en: SubagentRole is the boundary contrast for Orchestrator. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but SubagentRole's reviewed definition is “Subagent role is a coordination role; its differentiating condition is that it is a CoordinationRole distinguished by bounded work, authority, context, and upward reporting.”. shared parent CoordinationRole does not make it a Orchestrator.

expected_result.zh: SubagentRole 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Orchestrator。
expected_result.en: SubagentRole retains its own type; validation must not promote it to Orchestrator from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: SubagentRole は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで Orchestrator へ昇格してはなりません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 Orchestrator（编排者角色）由 orchestration-actors-delegation 拥有，用于“当对象表达一项可由不同运行主体承担的协作职责，或某主体在给定任务和时段承担该职责的绑定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms Orchestrator (orchestrator role) is owned by orchestration-actors-delegation for the use case “Own an object when it expresses a collaboration responsibility that different runtime actors may bear, or a binding assigning that responsibility for a task and interval.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は Orchestrator（オーケストレーター役割）を orchestration-actors-delegation が「対象が複数の実行主体が担い得る協働責務、または特定タスク・期間で主体へ責務を割り当てるバインディングを表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 Orchestrator 的 semantic kind 为 role，主父或骨架为 Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole，并满足“semantic kind=role；backbone=Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Orchestrator has semantic kind role, primary parent or backbone Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole, and invariants “semantic kind=role; backbone=Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は Orchestrator の semantic kind が role、主親または骨格が Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole であり、「semantic kind=role、backbone=Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: Orchestrator 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for Orchestrator were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: Orchestrator の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 编排者角色已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: orchestrator role was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: オーケストレーター役割は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 CoordinationRole：Orchestrator（semantic kind=role，骨架 Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole）；SubagentRole（semantic kind=role，骨架 SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole）。双端条件：Orchestrator 条件：“编排者角色是一种协调角色；其区分条件是：它描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类”；SubagentRole 条件：“子智能体角色是以如下事实为区分特征的协调角色：它是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent CoordinationRole: Orchestrator (semantic kind=role, backbone Orchestrator-is_a-CoordinationRole); SubagentRole (semantic kind=role, backbone SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole). Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.

descriptions.zh: Orchestrator 用作SubagentRole的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 Orchestrator 的已审查定义是“编排者角色是一种协调角色；其区分条件是：它描述分解、委派、路由和综合职责，是可由不同 Actor 承担的协调角色，而非固定 Actor 子类。”。不能因 shared parent CoordinationRole 而把它归入SubagentRole。
descriptions.en: Orchestrator is the boundary contrast for SubagentRole. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but Orchestrator's reviewed definition is “As a coordination role, Orchestrator role is distinguished by the fact that orchestrator denotes decomposition, delegation, routing, and synthesis responsibilities and is therefore a CoordinationRole borne by actors, not a fixed actor subtype.”. shared parent CoordinationRole does not make it a SubagentRole.
descriptions.ja: Orchestrator は SubagentRole の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、Orchestrator の審査済み定義は「調整役割に属するオーケストレーター役割は、次の事実を種差とします：Orchestrator は分解、委任、経路制御、統合の責務を表すため、固定アクター下位型でなくアクターが担う CoordinationRole である。」です。shared parent CoordinationRole だけで SubagentRole にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: Orchestrator 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 SubagentRole。
expected_result.en: Orchestrator retains its own type; validation must not promote it to SubagentRole from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: Orchestrator は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで SubagentRole へ昇格してはなりません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 SubagentRole（子智能体角色）由 orchestration-actors-delegation 拥有，用于“当对象表达一项可由不同运行主体承担的协作职责，或某主体在给定任务和时段承担该职责的绑定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms SubagentRole (subagent role) is owned by orchestration-actors-delegation for the use case “Own an object when it expresses a collaboration responsibility that different runtime actors may bear, or a binding assigning that responsibility for a task and interval.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は SubagentRole（サブエージェント役割）を orchestration-actors-delegation が「対象が複数の実行主体が担い得る協働責務、または特定タスク・期間で主体へ責務を割り当てるバインディングを表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 SubagentRole 的 semantic kind 为 role，主父或骨架为 SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole，并满足“semantic kind=role；backbone=SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms SubagentRole has semantic kind role, primary parent or backbone SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole, and invariants “semantic kind=role; backbone=SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は SubagentRole の semantic kind が role、主親または骨格が SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole であり、「semantic kind=role、backbone=SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: SubagentRole 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for SubagentRole were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: SubagentRole の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 子智能体角色已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 CoordinationRole：SubagentRole（semantic kind=role，骨架 SubagentRole-is_a-CoordinationRole）；WorkerRole（semantic kind=role，骨架 WorkerRole-is_a-CoordinationRole）。双端条件：SubagentRole 条件：“子智能体角色是以如下事实为区分特征的协调角色：它是以受限任务、权限、上下文和向上汇报为区分特征的一种协调角色”；WorkerRole 条件：“工作者角色是接收有范围工作、执行约定任务并返回证据的协调角色，可由 Agent、模型服务或工具服务承担”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。

Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.

descriptions.zh: 在一次协调器的任务分解与委派运行中，系统将工作者角色（WorkerRole）记录为 TaskDistribution assigns_work_item_to WorkerRole 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“工作者角色是接收有范围工作、执行约定任务并返回证据的协调角色，可由 Agent、模型服务或工具服务承担”。
descriptions.en: During a coordinator run for task decomposition and delegation, the system records Worker role (WorkerRole) as the target of TaskDistribution assigns_work_item_to WorkerRole. Its reviewed definition is “Worker role is a coordination role that accepts scoped work, performs agreed tasks, and returns evidence; it may be borne by an agent, model service, or tool service”.

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 WorkerRole 以及方向保持不变的事实 assigns_work_item_to。
expected_result.en: The run can query WorkerRole together with direction-preserving fact assigns_work_item_to.

The canonical direction, owner orchestration-actors-delegation, relation kind causal, and layout role cross-link are Moonweave design inference choices; the source does not assert those ontology decisions.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI orchestration and handoffs heading and documented conceptual model

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 uses_agent_as_tool（uses agent as tool）由 orchestration-actors-delegation 拥有，用于“当对象表达一项可由不同运行主体承担的协作职责，或某主体在给定任务和时段承担该职责的绑定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms uses_agent_as_tool (uses agent as tool) is owned by orchestration-actors-delegation for the use case “Own an object when it expresses a collaboration responsibility that different runtime actors may bear, or a binding assigning that responsibility for a task and interval.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は uses_agent_as_tool（uses agent as tool）を orchestration-actors-delegation が「対象が複数の実行主体が担い得る協働責務、または特定タスク・期間で主体へ責務を割り当てるバインディングを表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 uses_agent_as_tool 的 predicate 为 uses_agent_as_tool，方向为 Orchestrator → AgentAsToolInvocation，relation kind 为 causal，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 Orchestrator→AgentAsToolInvocation、predicate=uses_agent_as_tool、relation kind=causal、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation uses_agent_as_tool has predicate uses_agent_as_tool, direction Orchestrator → AgentAsToolInvocation, relation kind causal, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction Orchestrator->AgentAsToolInvocation, predicate=uses_agent_as_tool, relation kind=causal, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 uses_agent_as_tool の predicate が uses_agent_as_tool、方向が Orchestrator → AgentAsToolInvocation、relation kind が causal、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 Orchestrator→AgentAsToolInvocation、predicate=uses_agent_as_tool、relation kind=causal、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。
